title: fraxinus caroliniana var. latifolia
intro: Fraxinus caroliniana var. latifolia, also known as the Carolina ash or green ash, is a variety of the ash tree species native to the southeastern United States. The bark and leaves of the Fraxinus caroliniana var. latifolia plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparations of Fraxinus caroliniana var. latifolia include teas, tinctures, and infusions made from the bark and leaves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
